# this is the build file for project 
# it is autogenerated by the xmake build system.
# do not edit by hand.

# project
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.15.0)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0091 NEW)
project(dotenv LANGUAGES CXX)

# target
add_executable(dotenv "")
set_target_properties(dotenv PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "dotenv")
set_target_properties(dotenv PROPERTIES RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/build/linux/x86_64/release")
target_include_directories(dotenv SYSTEM PRIVATE
    /home/eloide-novela/.xmake/packages/g/gtest/v1.16.0/ffe1b0301af44c69a4cb67d57595b02c/include
)
target_compile_options(dotenv PRIVATE
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-m64>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-m64>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-DNDEBUG>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-DNDEBUG>
)
set_target_properties(dotenv PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(dotenv PRIVATE cxx_std_23)
if(MSVC)
    target_compile_options(dotenv PRIVATE $<$<CONFIG:Release>:-O2>)
else()
    target_compile_options(dotenv PRIVATE -O3)
endif()
if(MSVC)
else()
    target_compile_options(dotenv PRIVATE -fvisibility=hidden)
endif()
if(MSVC)
    set_property(TARGET dotenv PROPERTY
        MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreaded$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:Debug>")
endif()
target_link_libraries(dotenv PRIVATE
    gmock
    gtest
    pthread
)
target_link_directories(dotenv PRIVATE
    /home/eloide-novela/.xmake/packages/g/gtest/v1.16.0/ffe1b0301af44c69a4cb67d57595b02c/lib
)
target_link_options(dotenv PRIVATE
    -m64
)
target_sources(dotenv PRIVATE
    src/dotenv.cpp
    examples/example1.cpp
)
